ogTitle: Dundowran Beach vs Dunkeld: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Dundowran Beach and Dunkeld.
heading: Dundowran Beach vs Dunkeld — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Dundowran Beach, Queensland and Dunkeld, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Dunkeld has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Dundowran Beach (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Dundowran Beach or Dunkeld safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Dundowran Beach has a flood risk score of 59/100, while Dunkeld scores 51/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Dundowran Beach scores 31/100 for bushfire risk. Dunkeld scores 36/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Dundowran Beach or Dunkeld?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Dunkeld has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.95% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
